title: phyllanthus wheeleri
intro: Phyllanthus wheeleri, also known as Wheeler's Phyllanthus or Dwarf Phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in India and Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus wheeleri include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, improve liver function, and reduce the risk of certain diseases such as diabetes and cancer. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus wheeleri is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
